---
title: 'New Post at Wolfe for Office'
date: '2016-09-03T15:08:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5501169567576986443'
blogger_filename: '/2016/09/new-post-at-wolfe-for-office.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'News & Updates'
---

<br />
I wrote a new post: <a href="http://wolfeforoffice.blogspot.com/2016/09/i-am-conservative-liberal-republicans.html" target="_blank">I am a Conservative-Liberal | Republicans and Democrats are actually the same party, here's why I'm a #ChristianLibertarian</a><br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rvsd-politics-1-1bc4b2242bbb.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="176" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rvsd-politics-1-b7d31868c034.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rvsd-politics-2-109f30252081.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="176" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rvsd-politics-2-b5f32fd0d5ac.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rvsd-politics-3-e16a3c26f27e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="178" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rvsd-politics-3-692a18e85d8e.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18.0pt;">Darrell
G. Wolfe</span><span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot; , serif; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-bidi;"><o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18.0pt;"><br /></span></div>
<br />
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Story
Teller | <a href="https://www.16personalities.com/infj-personality">INFJ</a> |
Futuristic | Intellection | Learner | Ideation | Achiever | Command | Input |
Focus | <a href="https://www.ted.com/talks/emilie_wapnick_why_some_of_us_don_t_have_one_true_calling?language=en">Multipotentialite</a><o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
